# SRC058 - ACCC Advertising and Promotions

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Platform Policy |
| Authors / source | ACCC |
| Year | Current |
| Source type | Regulator guidance |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://www.accc.gov.au/business/advertising-and-promotions](https://www.accc.gov.au/business/advertising-and-promotions) |

## Bias / limitation

Regulator guidance; Australian law context.

## Core takeaway

Businesses must be honest and able to prove claims they make or advertise.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to require claim facts as Markdown data, not invented text.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC058
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:
- What it does not prove:
- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
